ddls:
CREATE TABLE "yachts" (
  "yacht_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each yacht */,
  "sail_number" INTEGER /* Sail number of the yacht */,
  "boat_name" TEXT /* Name of the yacht */,
  "nhc" REAL /* Handicap rating of the yacht (NHC) */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner of the yacht */,
  "design" TEXT /* Design of the yacht */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the yacht */,
  "beam" REAL /* Beam of the yacht */,
  "draft" REAL /* Draft of the yacht */,
  "builder" TEXT /* Builder of the yacht */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the yacht was built */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("yacht_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g. regatta, offshore) */,
  "event_length" REAL /* Length of the event (in miles) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "yacht_id" INTEGER /* ID of the yacht */,
  "finish_time" TEXT /* Finish time of the yacht */,
  "elapsed_time" TEXT /* Elapsed time of the yacht */,
  "corrected_time" TEXT /* Corrected time of the yacht */,
  "finish_position" INTEGER /* Finish position of the yacht */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_yacht_id FOREIGN KEY ("yacht_id") REFERENCES yachts ("yacht_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ranks" (
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rank */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "yacht_id" INTEGER /* ID of the yacht */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the yacht in the event */,
  "points" REAL /* Points of the yacht in the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ranks_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ranks_yacht_id FOREIGN KEY ("yacht_id") REFERENCES yachts ("yacht_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "helm_crew" (
  "helm_crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each helm and crew */,
  "yacht_id" INTEGER /* ID of the yacht */,
  "helm_name" TEXT /* Name of the helm */,
  "crew_name" TEXT /* Name of the crew */,
  "helm_experience" INTEGER /* Experience of the helm (in years) */,
  "crew_experience" INTEGER /* Experience of the crew (in years) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("helm_crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_helm_crew_yacht_id FOREIGN KEY ("yacht_id") REFERENCES yachts ("yacht_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g. admin, sailor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission of the role (e.g. view_results, upload_results) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g. regatta, offshore) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_yacht" (
  "event_yacht_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event yacht */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "yacht_id" INTEGER /* ID of the yacht */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_yacht_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_yacht_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_yacht_yacht_id FOREIGN KEY ("yacht_id") REFERENCES yachts ("yacht_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "yacht_helm_crew" (
  "yacht_helm_crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each yacht helm crew */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "yacht_id" INTEGER /* ID of the yacht */,
  "helm_crew_id" INTEGER /* ID of the helm and crew */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("yacht_helm_crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_yacht_helm_crew_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_yacht_helm_crew_yacht_id FOREIGN KEY ("yacht_id") REFERENCES yachts ("yacht_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_yacht_helm_crew_helm_crew_id FOREIGN KEY ("helm_crew_id") REFERENCES helm_crew ("helm_crew_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "yacht_designs" (
  "yacht_design_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each yacht design */,
  "yacht_id" INTEGER /* ID of the yacht */,
  "design" TEXT /* Design of the yacht */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("yacht_design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_yacht_designs_yacht_id FOREIGN KEY ("yacht_id") REFERENCES yachts ("yacht_id")
)
column_names: Name of the owner of the yacht
Type of the event (e.g. regatta, offshore)
Rank of the yacht in the event
Points of the yacht in the event
Unique identifier for each helm and crew
Role of the user (e.g. admin, sailor)
Permission of the role (e.g. view_results, upload_results)
Unique identifier for each event type
Unique identifier for each event yacht
Unique identifier for each yacht helm crew
ID of the helm and crew
Unique identifier for each yacht design
